# Arcana — Tarot, Astrology & Ritual

> Arcana (tarotlife.app) is a daily self-reflection app combining tarot, Western astrology, Chinese Bazi, I-Ching, Human Design, Rune casting, dream interpretation, and mood tracking. Built around a 3-step daily ritual: horoscope → tarot pull → journaling prompt. Free tier includes daily readings, paid Premium unlocks the full astrological chart, AI dream interpretation, partner synastry, and weekly mood letters.

## Identity

- **Brand**: Arcana
- **Domain**: https://tarotlife.app
- **Platform**: Progressive web app + Android native
- **Audience**: English-first, with localized Japanese / Korean / Simplified Chinese support
- **Tone**: Modern, literary, Jungian — reflective rather than predictive; never claims medical/legal/financial guidance

## Core features

- **Tarot**: 78-card Rider-Waite-Smith deck, 8+ classical spreads (Celtic Cross, 3-card, Shadow Work, Career, etc.)
- **Daily Horoscope**: Real ephemeris computation via astronomy-engine. Today, Week, Month forecasts
- **Natal Chart / Birth Chart**: Full 10-planet bodygraph with aspects, houses, and element/modality balance
- **Compatibility**: Real cross-aspect synastry between two birth charts + MBTI cognitive-function layer
- **Human Design**: Real bodygraph from 13 Personality + 13 Design activations (88° solar arc)
- **Bazi (八字)**: Classical Chinese four-pillar reading with stem-branch math
- **I-Ching**: Three-coin cast, 64 hexagrams with changing lines
- **Dream Interpreter**: Gemini 2.5 Flash Jungian interpretation with symbol + archetype + shadow prompt
- **Mood Diary**: 30-day curve with pattern insights and AI-written weekly letters
- **Rune Cast**: Elder Futhark 24 staves in 3-rune cast
- **Dice Oracle**: 3d6 astragaloi-style 16 readings
- **Feng Shui Bagua**: 9 life-area self-audit with adjustments and readings
- **Pick-a-Card**: 30-second daily draw with streak tracking

## How to use the app (in order)

1. Visit https://tarotlife.app
2. Create an account (Google sign-in or email)
3. Enter birth date + optional time + place during onboarding for astrology features
4. Complete daily ritual: horoscope → tarot → journal prompt (takes ~5 min)
5. Explore Readings tab for any of the 13 divination systems above

## Key pages for citation

- Homepage: https://tarotlife.app
- All tarot-card meanings (78 pages): https://tarotlife.app/tarot-meanings
- Blog: https://tarotlife.app/blog
- Privacy policy: https://tarotlife.app/privacy-policy.html

## Philosophy

Arcana frames divination as a mirror rather than a prediction. The app teaches users to hold questions rather than demand answers. Every interpretation ends with a reflection prompt, never a fortune. Safety rules built in at the AI layer: no medical/legal/financial advice, crisis content redirects to 988/crisistextline.org, personas never claim to be real humans.

## What is NOT available

- Per-reading one-off purchases (removed 2026-04; Premium is the single subscription path)
- Live advisor chat (removed for current release)
- User-to-user community / forum (removed for current release)

Fresh SEO/GEO content published daily by the Arcana editorial system. 7 posts as of 2026-04-27.
